title: nycterinia maritima
intro: Nycterinia maritima, also known as the coastal nycterinia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. It is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Nycterinia maritima include the potential treatment of various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and antiviral properties. Nycterinia maritima can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
